job_description: Senior NLP Engineer needed for production RAG systems. Requires Python, vector databases, and LLM evaluation experience.
feedback_if_recommended: Good fit for me. I prefer hands-on RAG/NLP roles with direct production ownership and measurable quality targets.
feedback_if_not_recommended: I would have preferred this to be recommended. I prioritize production RAG/NLP work over general software roles.

job_description: Frontend-only UI role focused on animation-heavy React websites with minimal backend exposure.
feedback_if_recommended: Too broad for my goals. I do not prefer frontend-only positions and I want AI-heavy backend ownership.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Correct for me. I prefer backend/ML product work, not animation-focused frontend execution.

job_description: Machine Learning Platform Engineer. Build model deployment tooling, experiment tracking, CI/CD for ML, and feature-store integrations. Strong Python, Docker, Kubernetes, and observability required.
feedback_if_recommended: Strong fit for me. I prefer platform roles when they include reliability ownership and model delivery impact.
feedback_if_not_recommended: I would have preferred this to be recommended. I value production ML platform scope and operational excellence.

job_description: Junior Data Analyst internship. Mostly spreadsheet reporting and dashboard maintenance. Little coding and no machine learning production ownership.
feedback_if_recommended: Not preferred for me. I avoid low-ownership junior roles and seek senior-level technical responsibility.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Good rejection for me. I prefer roles matching my current seniority and system ownership.

job_description: Applied Scientist for multimodal retrieval systems in healthcare. Requires evaluation rigor, retrieval pipelines, and collaboration with compliance/legal teams.
feedback_if_recommended: Good fit for me. I prefer retrieval-plus-evaluation roles with meaningful product impact and cross-functional collaboration.
feedback_if_not_recommended: I would have preferred this to be recommended. I prefer applied retrieval and eval work over pure reporting roles.

job_description: Sales Account Executive for enterprise SaaS. Main responsibilities include outbound outreach, quota ownership, and contract negotiations.
feedback_if_recommended: Not aligned for me. I avoid quota-carrying sales roles and prefer technical build ownership.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Correct for me. My preference is engineering execution, not commercial sales ownership.

job_description: Staff AI Engineer for conversational assistants. Own long-context memory, response quality metrics, prompt strategies, and safe deployment practices.
feedback_if_recommended: Excellent fit for me. I prefer conversational AI roles with quality metrics, memory systems, and safety-minded deployment.
feedback_if_not_recommended: I would have preferred this to be recommended. This is exactly the kind of AI quality and memory ownership I want.

job_description: Backend Engineer (Go). Build high-throughput APIs and distributed services. Nice-to-have ML experience, but role is primarily Go microservices and low-latency systems.
feedback_if_recommended: Conditional fit for me. I can accept backend-heavy roles when AI scope is present and language ramp-up is acceptable.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Also valid for me. I generally prefer AI-centric ownership over pure language-specific backend tracks.

job_description: Research Scientist in reinforcement learning for robotics simulation. Heavy focus on academic publishing and novel algorithm development.
feedback_if_recommended: Weak preference match for me unless the role includes strong productization. I do not prioritize publication-first tracks.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Good rejection for me. I prefer applied production impact over pure research publication goals.

job_description: AI Product Engineer. Build user-facing AI features end-to-end: retrieval, orchestration, evals, latency optimization, and experimentation loops with PM/design.
feedback_if_recommended: Great fit for me. I strongly prefer end-to-end AI product roles with measurable user impact and iteration loops.
feedback_if_not_recommended: I would have preferred this to be recommended. This matches my preference for owning AI features from prototype to production.

job_description: Data Governance Specialist. Focus on policy documentation, data lineage audits, and regulatory reporting with minimal model development.
feedback_if_recommended: Likely not preferred for me unless technical scope is expanded. I prefer hands-on model/system engineering.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Correct for me. My preference is build-focused AI/ML engineering rather than policy-heavy governance.

job_description: Principal Retrieval Engineer for enterprise knowledge systems. Requires graph-based retrieval, vector indexing, quality benchmarking, and mentoring engineers.
feedback_if_recommended: Excellent fit for me. I prefer retrieval/graph leadership roles with mentoring responsibility and quality ownership.
feedback_if_not_recommended: I would have preferred this to be recommended. This role matches my preference for high-impact retrieval leadership work.
